original_image_tags: Aged, off-white paper with three punched holes at the top. The page contains mirrored/bleed-through text from the reverse side. At the bottom right, there is a purple ink stamp with inverted text:

elements.description: The page contains faint, backwards (bleed-through) typed text that is not directly legible. At the bottom, there is a red stamped label with text: 'XEROX COPIES', 'DATE', and handwritten '11-29-66' and '1'.

judge.reason: Description A reports a purple ink stamp with inverted text, while Description B reports a red stamp with specific text ('XEROX COPIES', 'DATE', '11-29-66', '1') — these are contradictory claims about the same visual element.
